title: Customers
description: Synthetic Zava customers. Contains SYNTHETIC PII-like columns (email, phone) for Purview classification / DLP / column-mask demos. All values are fake (@example.com, 555 numbers).

email.description: SYNTHETIC PII-like; always @example.com. For label/DLP/mask demos.

phone.description: SYNTHETIC PII-like; always +1-555-xxx-xxxx. For label/DLP/mask demos.
